shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch mascot holding a phone with a fading photo on the screen, symbolising Snapchat's ephemeral format.
assets.caption: Hatch mascot holding a phone with a fading photo on the screen, symbolising Snapchat's ephemeral format.
assets.prompt: Snapchat's Disappearing Messages | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) holding a translucent phone with a photo that is visibly fading — the image on the screen has a gentle dissolve effect suggesting ephemerality. Cream background. Hatch's expression is curious and present. No speech bubble, no copy. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch examining a diagram showing the lifecycle of a Snapchat snap from send to expiration.
assets.caption: Hatch examining a diagram showing the lifecycle of a Snapchat snap from send to expiration.
assets.prompt: Snapchat's Disappearing Messages | failure-mechanism: Hatch in a thinking pose, looking at a simple timeline diagram: send snap → recipient opens → 5-second window with a small countdown timer → photo disappears, replaced by a notification. The lifecycle of an ephemeral message made visual. Cream background. Watermark bottom-right. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression.
